subject: Weavile, a dark bipedal Pokemon with a red crown-like head ornament and sharp claws, leaping in a snowy mountain environment
description: A sleek, dark-colored bipedal creature leaps dynamically through the frame, sharp claws extended on both hands. It has a prominent red feather-like crown ornament on its head and a matching red tail. The body is dark gray-black, low-profile and wiry — built for speed. The background suggests a snowy or icy mountain environment. The creature's mouth is open in what reads as aggression or a battle cry, and its posture conveys predatory energy. The overall composition frames this as a fast, dangerous hunter in motion.
foreground: Weavile leaping with claws extended, dark body, red head ornament
background: snowy mountain or icy terrain, cool blue-gray tones
